daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Aries. There's a quiet confidence flowing through you that people are absolutely picking up on. Trust that magnetic pull—it's guiding you toward something real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person needs to hear something you've been holding back. Single? That spark you feel around someone specific? It's mutual energy. Act on it if it feels right.
daily.career: Today's all about showing up as your authentic self at work. Your fresh perspective on something is exactly what's needed. Don't dim it down—your take matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or dancing to your favorite song, honor that impulse. Your nervous system will thank you for the release.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is all about recalibrating your vibe. Mercury's moving in your favor, so trust those gut feelings and don't overthink the small stuff. It's a solid time for fresh starts.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this week's asking you to be vulnerable in a real way. That text you've been scared to send? The conversation that needs happening? The universe is backing you.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked right now—this is your moment to pitch ideas or take on that project you've been eyeing. Trust your instincts, but also listen to feedback. Collab > solo grind this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and actual rest, not just scrolling in bed. Whether that's yoga, walks, or dancing to your favorite songs—your nervous system will thank you for the care.
